problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photonic. Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
